title: Writing an Email
drDigitalIntro:
To write an email, click New Message.
• Put the recipient's address in the To field.
• Write a clear subject line that says what it's about.
• Type your message, then click Send. Not ready? Save it as a Draft.
• Tip: press Tab to jump between fields quickly, and Shift+Tab to go back.

playgroundTask.instructions: Practice composing an email! Open Mail, click the pencil to compose, and type this message exactly.
playgroundTask.subject: Hello from me!
playgroundTask.requiredBody: Hello Doctor Digital! I am learning how to write emails. This is so useful!

drDigitalSuccess: A perfectly composed email! You nailed the To field, the subject, and the message body.
drDigitalHint: Click the pencil icon in Mail to start a new email, fill in each field, then click Send.
